item.title: PHILIPS MEDICAL SYSTEMS NEDERLAND B.V.: Philips Azurion systems not configured with an optional auxiliary pan handle. Includes the below product descriptions and corresponding mode Recall
item.product: Philips Azurion systems not configured with an optional auxiliary pan handle. Includes the below product descriptions and corresponding mode
item.summary: Potential safety issue with Philips Azurion systems, where longitudinal and transverse table movements may be impacted due to mechanical wear of the Float Tabletop control on the control module. Product details: Philips Azurion systems not configured with an optional auxiliary pan handle. Includes the below product descriptions and corresponding model numbers. 1. Azurion 3 M12; Model Numbers: 722063, 722229. 2. Azurion 3 M15; Model Numbers: 722222, 722064, 722280, 722...
item.affectedPeople: Nationwide distribution.
